debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝³ : OrderBot ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝¹ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace ι
hX :
  Locally
    (fun x =>
      @ProbabilityTheory.ClassDL ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝ x 𝓕
        P)
    𝓕 X P
h𝓕 : 𝓕.IsRightContinuous
⊢ Locally
    (fun x =>
      @ProbabilityTheory.ClassD ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝ x 𝓕
        P)
    𝓕 X P

failed_attempts:
rcases topOrderOrNoTopOrder ι with h | h
  · haveI : OrderTop ι := h
    exact hX.mono ClassDL.classD
  · haveI : NoMaxOrder ι := NoTopOrder.to_noMaxOrder ι
    rw [← Locally.locally_iff isStable_classD]
    exact hX.mono ClassDL.locally_classD

rcases topOrderOrNoTopOrder ι with h | h
  · have : IsStable 𝓕 (ClassD (E := E) · 𝓕 P) := fun X hX T hT ↦
      (hX.classDL.comp_stoppingTime hT).classD
    rw [← this.locally_iff_locally]
    exact hX.map (fun X hX ↦ locally_of_prop hX.classD)
  · have : IsStable 𝓕 (ClassD (E := E) · 𝓕 P) := isStable_classD

    exact hX.map (fun X hX ↦ hX.locally_classD)

rw [Locally.locally_iff]

  · have : NoTopOrder ι := h
